offer: For law firms processing 10–20 contracts/month, manual tracking causes missed compliance deadlines. We provide automated compliance monitoring instead of manual tracking of contract compliance metrics.
problem: Ensuring compliance with contract terms to avoid penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firms with a demo video
Participate in community forums for law firms' tools
try_it: Let users try monthly exception report generation on 1-3 contracts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
